title: MessageList::pop_last uses O(N) pop() loop where truncate suffices
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Performance / KISS
Location: src/tui/messages.rs:38-42 pop_last uses for _ in 0..count { self.messages.pop(); }
Violation: Vec::pop() in a loop performs count individual length decrements. Idiomatic operation is truncate. The hand-rolled loop confuses the reader — is it removing based on a predicate? No, just decrementing length.
Mandated Refactor: Replace body with self.messages.truncate(self.messages.len().saturating_sub(count));
